description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout, including a numeric keypad on the right and a row of function keys along the top. The keys are raised and individually separated, with white labeling on a predominantly black surface, providing high contrast for visibility. The keyboard features a wide, angular wrist rest at the bottom, which appears integrated into the main body. The surface finish is matte, reducing glare and fingerprints, and the overall build suggests a sturdy plastic construction. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and the branding is not clearly visible from the provided views. The keyboard appears to be in new or like-new condition, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A full-size black keyboard with a numeric keypad, white-labeled keys, and an integrated wrist rest, featuring a matte finish and a sturdy plastic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the wrist rest and all labeled keys.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the raised profile of the keys and the angular wrist rest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keyboard and the tops of the keys, with the wrist rest less visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the numeric keypad, raised keys, and the angular wrist rest.
